text_block_list.text:
One day, I noticed there was a note 
left on my table.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
"I'm going to that place. 
Tag along if you're free."

What does she even mean by that… I do 
have some free time so I'd like to find her 
but, where do I even start with "that place".

If she said it like that, then it must be 
someplace we've visited before. Now, 
in terms of places we've been to…
choice_data_list: She's got to be cloud watching by the river
She must be gazing at the sky on the roof
Maybe she's in that one town we visited?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: The sky's great as always here.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Huffff～～ Haaaa. Yeah, it's a great scenery.

Her face suddenly popped into my head. 
It was when we were by the river and 
something about the sky that day 
really enticed her.
choice_data_list: Alright, guess we're heading there

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh, you made it.
choice_data_list: I knew you were here Stego!
I knew you were here Stego!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Now get over here, come relax on the 
grass with me.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I've got some sweets too, a gift 
from a friend overseas. Thought we could 
enjoy them here.
choice_data_list: You really like this spot hey
You really like this spot hey

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……… 
Take a gander at the sky.

I raised my head to gaze at the infinitely 
wide blue sky. A few clouds floated 
gently above us.
choice_data_list: Uhm… It's a wonderful sky
Uhm… It's a wonderful sky

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's only a nice blue sky… Only ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
This sky we see everyday stretches on 
infinitely no matter where we go. It 
stretches past buildings… past rivers, 
even all the way over borders.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Imagining the sky like that, don't you 
start to feel a little excited inside?
choice_data_list: I think I get what you mean…?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hum, it's alright if you don't really get it, I'm just narrating my feelings, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Now then, let's go down to the riverbank. 
There just so happens to be a nice breeze 
coming through.

I was led down by Stay Gold to enjoy 
our sweets by the riverside.

Just like this, I went searching for Stay 
Gold. I made my way here but… she 
was nowhere to be found.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh. What's up… You heading back?
choice_data_list: Stego! Where were you?
Stego! Where were you?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was touring around "that place". 
Didn't I leave a note?

In the end, I still didn't find out where she 
was. I wonder what "that scenery" could've 
been……

Reaching the rooftop, I notice Stay Gold's 
legs dangling from the rooftop structure 
as she sat up there slouching.
choice_data_list: Isn't that dangerous?! Come down!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to sweat the small things. 
Still better than sitting on the edge of a 
cliff right?
choice_data_list: S-S-Sure, but…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …I'm burning this scenery into my memory —

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Since I don't come to the academy often. 
This type of scenery… It's unexpectedly 
rare y'know.
choice_data_list: How does the academy look then?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Well of course, it's not bad at all.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I want to commit all the different things I 
can see in this place to my memory 
before I leave for another journey.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You should take a closer look as well. It 
may be the same scenery you see everyday, 
but I reckon you could find something new.

Just like this, I went searching for Stay 
Gold. I made my way here but… she 
was nowhere to be found.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh. What's up… You heading back?
choice_data_list: Stego! Where were you?
Stego! Where were you?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was touring around "that place". 
Didn't I leave a note?

In the end, I still didn't find out where she 
was. I wonder what "that scenery" could've 
been……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're here… Let's get going then.
choice_data_list: Eh! Where are we going?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Well, to see what this town is really about.

I scurried behind her as she walked off 
and we arrived at a scene I've never 
seen before.
choice_data_list: This is?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I say we're here to see what this 
town is all about? …Where people carry 
out their day to day lives.

It felt like the complete opposite of the 
main street here. You could hear the 
sounds of people going about their lives, 
and the smell of curry wafted in the air.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't this get you feeling sort of excited? 
We're here to witness everyone's lives 
coming together at this very moment.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I don't know where my life is going to 
lead me. So it's always worth coming 
to see scenes like these.
choice_data_list: Yeah, you're truly full of curiosity
Yeah, you're truly full of curiosity

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hum, life is short y'know. I'm always chasing to learn more about everything…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Like about this town… and even the people 
who live here. Something like that.
choice_data_list: Then should we explore some more?
Then should we explore some more?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hmm…… Did I manage to spark an interest in you now huh. There's a few places I want to check out.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: It's the start of our mini exploration then.

Just like this, I went searching for Stay 
Gold. I made my way here but… she 
was nowhere to be found.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh. What's up… You heading back?
choice_data_list: Where were you?
Where were you?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was touring around "that place". 
Didn't I leave a note?

In the end, I still didn't find out where she 
was. I wonder what "that scenery" could've 
been……
